content: I'll help you test this project. Let me first explore the codebase to understand its structure and find any existing test configurations.

toolInput.prompt:
Explore this codebase to understand:
1. What kind of project this is (language, framework)
2. What test frameworks are configured
3. Where tests are located
4. What test scripts are available in package.json or similar config files

Provide a concise summary of findings.

toolInput.command: find "C:\Users\SvenRoth\dinovo GmbH\AI Backup - Documents\03 Development\todoappdemo" -type f -name "*.json" | head -20
find "C:\Users\SvenRoth\dinovo GmbH\AI Backup - Documents\03 Development\todoappdemo" -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.go" \) | head -20
find "C:\Users\SvenRoth\dinovo GmbH\AI Backup - Documents\03 Development\todoappdemo" -type d | head -30
find "C:\Users\SvenRoth\dinovo GmbH\AI Backup - Documents\03 Development\todoappdemo" -type f -name "*.md" -o -name "CLAUDE.md" -o -name "*spec*" -o -name "*plan*" 2>/dev/null

toolInput.description: Read middle section of earlier session

content:
Based on the exploration, this project is currently in the **specification/planning phase** using the Shipwright framework. There is no actual source code or test infrastructure yet - the project hasn't reached the build phase where tests would be created.

**Current Status:**
- Project type: ToDo App demo
- Stack: Planned as Next.js + Supabase (TypeScript)
- Phase: In progress (specifications being defined)
- Tests: **None configured** - no `package.json`, no source code, no test files exist yet

**What you can do:**
1. **Run `/shipwright-build`** to start implementing the code (which will include setting up tests)
2. **Run `/shipwright-plan`** to review/finalize implementation plans first

Would you like me to proceed with one of these options, or did you have a specific test in mind that you'd like me to help configure?
